news.title: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
news.detail: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.

news.title: Unusual Machines and other drone stocks surge on report Pentagon considering stakes in the industry
news.detail: Drone stocks surged Thursday on a report the Trump administration is in talks to fund several firms, including one in which Donald Trump Jr. is a shareholder.

news.title: Oil prices turn lower as U.S.-Iran ceasefire extension awaits Trump approval
news.detail: Oil prices pulled back Thursday, erasing earlier gains on a report that U.S. and Iranian negotiators reached an agreement to extend ceasefire.
